notice.bootloaderRequested: Device will restart into upgrade mode.

error.device: Device error: check the connection or query the device again

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Connect the device to view versions, runtime, and maintenance actions.

deviceInfo.title: Device information
deviceInfo.subtitle: Read automatically after connection. You can refresh manually.

deviceActions.title: Maintenance
deviceActions.subtitle: Restart and upgrade are maintenance actions. Confirm the device is safe before continuing.

restartDialog.title: Confirm device restart
restartDialog.content: The device will restart immediately. Reconnect after the connection recovers.

serialPortPicker.title: Select serial port
serialPortPicker.loadFailure: Failed to read serial port list: {error}

hex.title: HEX send
hex.help: Paste formats such as AA01 or 0xAA,0x01. Input is normalized with spaces automatically.
hex.invalidCharacters: HEX can only contain 0-9, A-F, and common separators
hex.incompleteByte: HEX must be complete bytes (two characters per byte)

debugDashboard.title: Live data
debugDashboard.subtitle: Watch digital state, analog values, and offset trend across 8 channels.
debugDashboard.connectFirst: Connect serial to show live data

offset.title: Offset trend
offset.empty: Start polling to show the trend

simulation.title: Simulation
simulation.subtitle: Use offset to watch how the car moves relative to the line.
simulation.connectFirst: Connect the device to start simulation

viewport.title: Car pose
viewport.description: Offset drives the car position in real time. Drag to adjust the view.

connection.notReady: Connect and identify the device to calibrate

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.description: Prepare white and black calibration materials, then capture and save them in order.

white.title: Capture white
white.description: Place the white calibration material, then start capture.

black.title: Capture black
black.description: Place the black calibration material, then start capture.

save.title: Save
save.description: Confirm the captured result, then save it to Flash.

confirmSave.title: Save calibration data?
confirmSave.content: Saving will overwrite calibration data in device Flash.

file.title: Firmware file
file.subtitle: Select a .bin firmware package, enter upgrade mode, then start upgrading.

enterDialog.title: Enter upgrade mode?
enterDialog.content: The device will switch to upgrade mode and disconnect serial automatically. Reconnect serial after it finishes, then start upgrading.

completeDialog.title: Upgrade complete
completeDialog.content: Firmware upgrade is complete and serial has disconnected. Reconnect serial to continue using the device.

startDialog.title: Confirm firmware upgrade
startDialog.content: Do not disconnect or power off during upgrade.

serial.unsupported: Serial connection is not supported in this environment

firmware.normalModeRequired: Only normal mode can enter upgrade mode

package.packageInvalidHeaderSize: Firmware package header length is invalid
package.packageHardwareMismatch: Firmware package hardware version does not match
package.packageTargetMismatch: Firmware package target type does not match
package.packageAppBaseMismatch: Firmware package start address does not match
package.packageLengthMismatch: Firmware package length does not match

iap.invalidFormat: Firmware upgrade response format is invalid
iap.chunkTooLarge: Firmware data chunk is too large
iap.responseFormat: Device upgrade response format is invalid
iap.rejected: Device rejected the firmware upgrade request
